add-collision.text: Add collision-detection to a reactor-based game.

add-level.text: Add a second level - with a different background image - to an existing reactor-based game.

add-score-draw.text: Modify the draw-state function to display the score on the screen.

add-score-state.text: Add a score field to the gameState structure.

add-score-tick.text: Modify the next-state-tick function to increment or decrement the score.

add-splash.text: Add a splash screen to a reactor animation.

add-timer.text: Use a timer to add a collision animation to a reactor animation.

constructors-accessors.text: Use and explain constructors and accessors.

draw-state-1-num.text: Write the draw-state function for a reactor using a state containing one number.

draw-state-2-num.text: Write the draw-state function for a reactor using a state containing two numbers.

make-animation.text: Combine next-state-tick and draw-state creatively to build an animation.

manage-complexity.text: Use nested structures to manage complexity in a sophisticated game.

refactor.text: Refactor existing code to simplify it, preserving the original code's behavior.

state-from-animation.text: Use data structures to model the state of an animation.

when-use-data-structures.text: Identify programming patterns that require data structures.
